name: TOXIC AUTONOMOUS NODULE
definition: PLUMMER DISEASE = TOXIC ADENOMA hyperthyroidism caused by one / two hyperfunctioning nodules independent of normal
dominant_finding: radioiodine uptake (RAIU) mildly to moderately elevated
discriminating_features: radioiodine uptake (RAIU) mildly to moderately elevated
concentration of radiopharmaceutical to a far greater degree than surrounding extranodular

general: radioiodine uptake (RAIU) mildly to moderately elevated
concentration of radiopharmaceutical to a far greater degree than surrounding extranodular
